description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Windows that triggers on push events. The workflow should have three jobs: clang-cl, msvc, and mingw-sdl. The clang-cl and msvc jobs run on a windows-2022 environment, check out the repository, cache CPM.cmake packages, and then configure and build a project using CMake with different compilers and configurations. The mingw-sdl job runs on an ubuntu-latest environment with a Fedora container, installs dependencies, checks out the repository, and builds the project using CMake and MinGW.
